name: UBA : Replication Request from a Non-Domain Controller
notes: Detects replication requests from an illegitimate Domain Controler
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event matches Event ID (custom) is any of 4662
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controller Administrators - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of Object Type (custom) match (\%\{19195a5b\-6da0\-11d0\-afd3\-00c04fd930c9})|(Object Type\: domainDNS)
when any of Properties (custom) match (\{1131f6ad\-9c07\-11d1\-f79f\-00c04fc2dcd2})|(\{19195a5b\-6da0\-11d0\-afd3\-00c04fd930c9\})|(Replicating Directory Changes All)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Replication Request from a Non-Domain Controller on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event matches Event ID (custom) is any of 4662
AND NOT when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controller Administrators - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when any of Object Type (custom) match (\%\{19195a5b\-6da0\-11d0\-afd3\-00c04fd930c9})|(Object Type\: domainDNS)
AND when any of Properties (custom) match (\{1131f6ad\-9c07\-11d1\-f79f\-00c04fc2dcd2})|(\{19195a5b\-6da0\-11d0\-afd3\-00c04fd930c9\})|(Replicating Directory Changes All)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Replication Request from a Non-Domain Controller
